promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this closure audit as active A2 control memory, as proof of global intake completion, or as authority to promote any nominated archive parent without a separate bounded child reduction.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the just-completed A0 child closed the last remaining parent in the early a2feed big-doc lane, so the real bounded next step was a live-ledger closure audit rather than guessing from stale queue state.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The four completed early a2feed children now provide enough coverage to exit that lane as a primary re-entry pool and to re-rank the next unresolved source-bearing archive parents using current ledger state.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The prior post-archive selection audit was used to preserve lane-transition logic, the archive packaged-sequence closure audit was used to keep stale archive-package reopening blocked, and the cache-export and deep-archive-root first-pass parents were used to compare the two strongest next archive lanes now that early a2feed closure is real.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it remains a topology-heavy 7805-file root map whose own first-pass candidate summary says the next descent should be registry-driven, making it lower-yield for immediate A2-mid reduction than the smaller cache save-export family.
Deferred because it is still downstream of the deep-archive root lane and benefits from an explicit lane-selection step before deeper migrated-run re-entry.
Deferred because descendant run families remain meaningful but should not outrank the cleaner export-lineage bridge packet and the unresolved root-versus-descendant lane choice.

raw_source_reread_reason: This batch is a routing audit. The live ledger plus the completed early-a2feed children and the first-pass cache and deep-archive parent artifacts were sufficient to nominate the next bounded target without reopening raw archive files.

candidate_items.name: EARLY_A2FEED_BIGDOC_LANE_IS_NOW_DIRECT_CHILD_CLOSED_ENOUGH_TO_EXIT_AS_PRIMARY_REENTRY_POOL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the routing fact that the four early a2feed big-doc parents now each have bounded A2-mid children and no longer form the strongest immediate unresolved pool.

candidate_items.name: POST_ARCHIVE_A2FEED_BIGDOC_SELECTION_AUDIT_IS_NOW_DISCHARGED_BY_CHILD_COMPLETION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the fact that the earlier routing audit has now been fully acted on and should not continue to drive queue text as if the lane were still open.

candidate_items.name: NEXT_UNRESOLVED_SOURCE_BEARING_POOL_NOW_SITS_IN_ARCHIVE_SAVE_EXPORT_AND_DEEP_ARCHIVE_LANES
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the narrowed live unresolved archive pool after early a2feed closure: the strongest remaining source-bearing parents now cluster in the purgeable cache save-export family and the deep-archive root family.

candidate_items.name: PURGEABLE_CACHE_SAVE_EXPORT_FAMILY_IS_THE_STRONGEST_NEXT_REENTRY_TARGET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the selection result that the purgeable cache save-export family is the cleanest next archive parent because it is bounded, checksum-tight, and directly exposes retention-gradient evidence that later archive-derived packages often lose.

candidate_items.name: DEEP_ARCHIVE_ROOT_MILESTONE_SPLIT_REMAINS_REAL_BUT_LOWER_YIELD_THAN_CACHE_EXPORT_REENTRY_NOW
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the demotion rule that the deep-archive root remains important but is still a topology-first 7805-file root map whose own next-step note points to later registry-driven descent rather than immediate A2-mid reduction at the root.

candidate_items.name: CACHE_EXPORT_REENTRY_SHOULD_PRECEDE_DEEP_ARCHIVE_DESCENT_AND_DESCENDANT_RUN_SELECTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the ordering rule that the cleaner cache export bridge should be reduced before deeper deep-archive root or descendant run families, because it offers the least noisy transition from full-save retention evidence into later archive-loss and lineage questions.

quarantined_items.name: REOPENING_EARLY_A2FEED_BIGDOC_LANE_AS_IF_IT_WERE_STILL_UNCHILDED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The four strongest early a2feed big-doc parents now each have bounded A2-mid children, so treating that lane as still open would be stale-lane reopening.

quarantined_items.name: TREATING_EARLY_A2FEED_LANE_CLOSURE_AS_GLOBAL_LEDGER_COMPLETION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Closing the early a2feed lane does not erase unresolved archive save-export and deep-archive parents elsewhere in the intake surface.

quarantined_items.name: DEFAULTING_NEXT_TO_DEEP_ARCHIVE_ROOT_JUST_BECAUSE_FOLDER_ORDER_CONTINUES
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The deep-archive root is real but lower-yield now than the smaller, more bounded cache export bridge family.

quarantined_items.name: SKIPPING_CACHE_EXPORT_BRIDGE_AND_JUMPING_STRAIGHT_TO_DEEP_ARCHIVE_DESCENDANT_RUNS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Descendant run families remain meaningful, but the lane still benefits from resolving the cleaner export-lineage bridge before deeper archive descent.

quarantined_items.name: TREATING_PURGEABLE_CACHE_AS_NONREUSABLE_ONLY_BECAUSE_IT_IS_MARKED_SAFE_TO_DELETE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The delete marker does not erase the family's value as a bounded witness of fuller save-export contents and retention-gradient evidence.

quarantined_items.name: SELECTION_AUDIT_AS_ACTIVE_A2_CONTROL_UPDATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: This batch is a bounded routing audit under A2-mid and must not be promoted directly into active control memory.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the live routing facts that matter now: the early a2feed big-doc lane is direct-child closed, the next unresolved source-bearing archive pool is the cache-export versus deep-archive family split, and the purgeable cache save-export family is the strongest next bounded re-entry target.
They remain selection-only, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active A2 authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain stale-lane reopening, global-completion overread, folder-order bias, premature deep-archive descent, or control-memory promotion rather than clean A2-mid routing packets.
The audit is useful for target selection, but not promotable as active law.
